preLabels.batchListDescription: Track goods receipt barcodes printed against Netsis purchase orders.
preLabels.checkingExistingLabels: Checking labels already printed for this order...
preLabels.createDescription: Pre-label batch created from purchase order
preLabels.createSelectOrder: Select an order with lines before creating pre-labels.
preLabels.createSubtitle: Load open Netsis purchase orders by customer code, choose an order, and create a pre-label batch for its lines.
preLabels.enterCustomerCode: Enter a customer code to list orders.
preLabels.existingLabelsInfo: {{count}} pre-labels already exist; these lines cannot be selected again.
preLabels.noLabels: No labels found for this batch.
preLabels.noOrderLines: No labelable lines were found for this order.
preLabels.noOrders: No open orders were found for this customer.
preLabels.orderLinesHint: In this first phase, each order line produces one label for the remaining quantity; serial-level splitting can be expanded later.
preLabels.preReceiptScanDescription: This barcode is a pre-printed goods receipt label. Stock, quantity and serial data will be read from the label and matched against the order.
preLabels.subtitle: Monitora codici a barre di ricezione pre-stampati, ristampe e consumo da scansione in un'unica vista operativa.
preLabels.title: Etichette pre-barcode di ricezione
preLabels.voidReason: Voided by user from pre-label screen
preLabels.loadError: Pre-label batches could not be loaded.
preLabels.selectCustomerDescription: Select a customer to list open incomplete Netsis orders.
preLabels.selectCustomerForOrders: Select a customer to see orders.

preLabelReceiving.batchListDescription: Start receiving for order batches whose labels were printed but not fully consumed.
preLabelReceiving.helpText: Starting a batch creates the goods receipt order and opens the barcode scanning screen.
preLabelReceiving.loadError: Receipt-from-label batches could not be loaded.
preLabelReceiving.subtitle: Seleziona lotti di etichette non consumati, apri la ricezione collegata all'ordine e verifica scansionando le etichette stampate.
preLabelReceiving.title: Ricezione da etichetta
preLabelReceiving.orderHelpText: In order mode, pre-labels are not required; select the order, verify lines and quantities, then complete goods receipt directly.
preLabelReceiving.orderStarted: Goods receipt from order was created successfully.
preLabelReceiving.orderModeDescription: Select an open Netsis order without creating labels up front. If the product has a supplier label, it can be used during scanning; otherwise verify the line and quantity manually.
preLabelReceiving.multiScanDescription: Add barcodes for batch {{batchNo}} one by one, by bulk paste, or from a photo before starting goods receipt.
preLabelReceiving.selectedStarted: Goods receipt order opened for {{count}} labels.
preLabelReceiving.scanNotFound: {{barcode}} was not found in this batch.
preLabelReceiving.scanUnavailable: {{barcode}} is already consumed or voided and cannot be scanned.
preLabelReceiving.scanAlreadyAssigned: {{barcode}} is already assigned to a goods receipt order.
preLabelReceiving.bulkEmpty: No barcodes were found to add.
preLabelReceiving.bulkAdded: {{count}} barcodes were added to the pool.
preLabelReceiving.photoUnsupported: This browser does not support barcode detection from photos. Use bulk text or terminal scanning instead.
preLabelReceiving.photoNoBarcode: No readable barcode was found in the photo.
preLabelReceiving.photoAdded: {{total}} barcodes were detected, {{count}} were added to the pool.
preLabelReceiving.photoFailed: Could not read barcodes from the photo.
preLabelReceiving.bulkScanPlaceholder: Paste one barcode per line. You can also paste output from a bulk terminal scan.
preLabelReceiving.photoHint: Photo reading depends on browser support; bulk manual entry remains the safe fallback.
preLabelReceiving.scannedPoolDescription: The goods receipt order will be opened only for labels in this pool.
preLabelReceiving.noScannedLabels: No labels have been added to the pool yet.
preLabelReceiving.scanMixedAssigned: Some selected labels are already linked to an existing goods receipt order and some are not. Start labels with the same state together.
